title: Discriminated Unions, Exhaustiveness, and Result Models · Type Recall
summary: Replace boolean status flags and ambiguous errors with explicit request, success, failure, and cancellation states. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an exhaustive asynchronous state machine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design variants with stable literal discriminants and variant-specific required data.
Use never assignments or exhaustive helpers to make newly added variants produce actionable diagnostics.
Represent expected domain failure as typed result variants while preserving unexpected exceptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.typescript:
// typescript-basics cumulative strict TypeScript portfolio.
// Add one typed behavior, runtime boundary, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Discriminated Unions evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Discriminated Unions assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Model idle → loading → success|failure for request 2. Each state owns only valid fields, stale request 1 cannot overwrite the result, and adding "cancelled" must create an exhaustiveness diagnostic until handled.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Discriminated Unions has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: Name the Discriminated Unions precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Model idle → loading → success|failure for request 2. Each state owns only valid fields, stale request 1 cannot overwrite the result, and adding "cancelled" must create an exhaustiveness diagnostic until handled.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Several optional properties express states as safely as a discriminated union.

options.text: Declare the domain relationship and identify every untrusted runtime boundary

stimulus.title: Pattern Evolution case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Model idle → loading → success|failure for request 3. Each state owns only valid fields, stale request 2 cannot overwrite the result, and adding "cancelled" must create an exhaustiveness diagnostic until handled.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Adding a union member is always backward compatible.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Add, deprecate, and migrate variants with compatibility tests and consumer impact evidence. Artifact under review: an exhaustive asynchronous state machine.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Pattern Evolution, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Pattern Evolution: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Model idle → loading → success|failure for request 4. Each state owns only valid fields, stale request 3 cannot overwrite the result, and adding "cancelled" must create an exhaustiveness diagnostic until handled.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Add, deprecate, and migrate variants with compatibility tests and consumer impact evidence.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
